title: Mayor Boodle Forgives the Straw Hats
description: On pages 4–7, Orange Town deals with the aftermath of Buggy’s defeat, while Luffy, Zoro, and Nami decide what they will carry away from the island.
scene: Buggy’s threat has been broken, but the town is still tense: the villagers, Mayor Boodle, Chouchou, and the Straw Hats all react to the damage left behind.

dialogue.speaker: Orange Town Villager
dialogue.text: Oh... so you're the villagers

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I think some of the pirate crew are still here

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If you want us to tell you then there isn't anything much left to tell you...

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: Ah!! chief!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Good- Ness era- Claus!! Please get up!

dialogue.speaker: Chouchou
dialogue.text: Dammit!! What the hell hap- pened here!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's definitely the work of those pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Chouchou
dialogue.text: Ah, sorry...

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: I did that to the chief!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hey! Why did you tell them that kinda thing on purpose...

dialogue.speaker: Chouchou
dialogue.text: You saw me do it, right?...

dialogue.speaker: Chouchou
dialogue.text: I know, but still!! That was because you had a good reason...

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: All of you, how dare you do this to our chief...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It doesn't matter what sort of excuse you give us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Who the hell are you!? Could you be pirates!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Ooh... if we didn't know any better, and just said "we're thieves" or "we're pirates" then it'd be instant death."

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We are Pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So you are!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hahaha

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Baka!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But it's the truth!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Let's run away!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Aah! They're running away!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Chase them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Yipes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We won't let you get away!!

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: We'll pay you back for what you did to the chief!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Why the hell did you make the situation more com- placated?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: This is a good village!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Who..?

summary: The part closes the Orange Town conflict by shifting from combat to consequences: treasure, forgiveness, pride, and the Straw Hats’ departure.
